heroHeadline: Iran's Biggest Passover Barrage in Weeks Hits Bnei Brak; IDF Kills 9 in Gaza; West Bank Strike Against Death Penalty Law
heroSubtitle: Iran launched ~10 ballistic missiles on Day 33 (April 1), the largest salvo in three weeks, striking Bnei Brak and wounding 10 including a critical girl; IDF killed 9 in Gaza including Hamas anti-tank commander Kamal Ayash in Mawasi; West Bank general strike against Israel's new death penalty law; Trump demands Hormuz reopening as Iran ceasefire precondition after Iran denied his claim their president sought a ceasefire
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
